query: Mattel Illumination Barbie animated feature film development 2025 announcement
a_issues: No major factual flaws relative to the anchor. b_issues: No major factual flaws relative to the anchor. reasoning: Both A and B contain the essential facts needed to answer the question correctly: in July 2025, Illumination and Mattel Studios closed/finalized a deal to develop a new Barbie movie; it will be the first animated Barbie feature for theaters; and Universal Pictures is the releasing studio via its partnership with Illumination. Both rely on strong entertainment-industry sources led by Deadline, which matches the anchor. Neither set contains a substantive contradiction that would likely mislead an LLM on the core answer, so they enable an equally correct response.
